home.name: Nguyen Van Linh
home.bio: Middle Backend Developer with 3+ years of experience building enterprise systems using Java Spring Boot. Experienced in designing and developing Microservices, RESTful APIs, and system integrations; proficient in PostgreSQL, Docker, Git, and AWS; a strong communicator in Agile/Scrum settings.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: Middle Backend Developer with 3+ years of experience building enterprise systems using Java Spring Boot. Experienced in business requirement analysis, technical solution proposals, and designing/developing Microservices, RESTful APIs, and system integrations in production environments. Proficient in PostgreSQL, capable of building and optimizing Stored Procedures, and skilled with Docker, Git, and AWS. A strong communicator who collaborates effectively with BrSEs, clients, and project members in Agile/Scrum settings.

projectsData.title: ONLINEQUIZZ – Online Examination System
projectsData.listDesc: Built a question bank management and online examination system for students.
projectsData.aboutDesc: Built an online quiz bank management and examination system. Developed the backend with Java Servlet, JSP, and JDBC; implemented registration/login, Google Login integration, and performance tuning.
projectsData.detailDescription: Built a question bank management and online examination system for students. The system supports exam creation, automatic grading, and user account management.
responsibilities: Developed the backend using Java Servlet, JSP, and JDBC.
Designed the database and built exam management features.
Built registration, login, and user authentication features.
Integrated Google Login.
Optimized source code and improved system performance.
Participated in bug fixing and supported product deployment.

projectsData.title: TRANSITLINK – Smart Shuttle Dispatch System
projectsData.listDesc: Manage and dispatch transit vehicles, supporting search, tracking, and real-time data operations.
projectsData.aboutDesc: Built the Spring Boot backend, RESTful APIs, Redis Cache, and Elasticsearch for search; implemented realtime features with WebSocket STOMP; deployed with Docker Compose, Nginx, and GitLab CI/CD.
projectsData.detailDescription: Built a system to manage and dispatch transit vehicles, supporting search, tracking, and real-time data operations. The system serves fleet operations handling large volumes of data.
responsibilities: Built the backend using Java Spring Boot.
Designed the database and built RESTful APIs.
Integrated Redis Cache to improve system performance.
Integrated Elasticsearch for data search.
Built real-time features using WebSocket STOMP.
Documented APIs using Swagger.
Deployed the application to a VPS using Docker Compose.
Set up Nginx Reverse Proxy and HTTPS.
Built the GitLab CI/CD pipeline.

projectsData.title: Partner, Warehouse & Asset Management System
projectsData.listDesc: Manage partners, warehouses, and assets with a Microservices architecture serving enterprise clients.
projectsData.aboutDesc: Developed Microservices with Spring Boot, RESTful APIs, and gRPC; integrated SSO/OAuth2/JWT and Kafka for asynchronous processing for enterprise clients.
projectsData.detailDescription: Contributed to building a partner, warehouse, and asset management system with a Microservices architecture serving enterprise clients. The system integrates multiple independent services processing large-scale data.
responsibilities: Analyzed business requirements and contributed to technical solution design.
Developed Microservices using Java Spring Boot.
Designed and implemented RESTful APIs and gRPC.
Integrated SSO Authentication, OAuth2, and JWT.
Integrated Kafka for asynchronous processing between systems.
Optimized performance and handled issues in the production environment.
Collaborated with BA, Testers, and DevOps throughout development.

projectsData.title: LAOONE – Super App & Content Management CMS
projectsData.homeDesc: A Super App platform integrating multiple Mini Apps with a centralized CMS and multi-channel notifications.
projectsData.listDesc: A Super App platform integrating multiple Mini Apps with a centralized CMS, notifications, and data synchronization.
projectsData.aboutDesc: Led backend development for the Super App, multi-channel authentication (Email/SMS OTP), Notifications + FCM, content management CMS, and PostgreSQL/Redis optimization.
projectsData.detailDescription: Built a Super App platform integrating multiple Mini Apps with a CMS for content management, UI configuration, notification management, and centralized data synchronization. The system serves thousands of users with a flexible, scalable architecture customizable per service.
responsibilities: Analyzed business requirements, designed technical solutions, and led backend service development.
Designed and implemented user Authentication & Authorization supporting Email OTP and SMS OTP.
Built a multi-channel Notification system, managed notification templates, and integrated Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM).
Developed a mechanism to synchronize user and business data from the Mini App platform into the central system.
Built a CMS for managing content, UI configuration, themes, and displayed components.
Designed and optimized the PostgreSQL database and Redis Cache to improve throughput and load capacity.
Set up deployment environments, containerized services with Docker, and established operational processes.
Performed code reviews, provided technical support to team members, and resolved performance and security issues.

projectsData.title: LAOID – National Digital Identity & Single Sign-On (SSO)
projectsData.homeDesc: A national digital identity and SSO platform, tuned to serve 3,000+ RPS with Java 21 Virtual Threads.
projectsData.listDesc: A national digital identity and SSO platform with centralized session management, high security, achieving 3,000+ RPS.
projectsData.aboutDesc: Built the SSO flow with OAuth2/JWT, session management with Redis Streams, upgraded to Java 21 Virtual Threads, achieving over 3,000 requests/second.
projectsData.detailDescription: Built a national digital identity platform and Single Sign-On (SSO) system that lets users authenticate once and access multiple applications across the ecosystem. Centralized session management, high security, and scalability to serve high traffic volumes.
responsibilities: Developed authentication/authorization services for the entire SSO ecosystem.
Built the SSO flow based on OAuth2/JWT.
Managed sessions: Access/Refresh Tokens, Token Rotation/Exchange, Revoke, and system-wide Logout.
Synchronized sessions asynchronously using Redis Streams.
Set up Rate Limiting and Session Management.
Upgraded from Java 17 to 21 with Virtual Threads.
Performed performance tuning for HikariCP and Lettuce.
Achieved over 3,000 requests per second (RPS).
